title: ficus cordata var. tristis
intro: Ficus cordata var. tristis, commonly known as the weeping fig, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Australia, belonging to the fig family (Moraceae). The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ficus cordata var. tristis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
